publishedRefreshWork.title: Maryland HB1389
publishedRefreshWork.summary: Maryland House bill to create a Maryland Bitcoin Reserve Fund, capitalized in part with certain seized gambling proceeds and invested only in bitcoin under State Treasurer custody rules.
publishedRefreshWork.shortNote: Bitcoin reserve fund bill tied to seized-gambling proceeds, with official hearing and custody details on the Maryland General Assembly record.
publishedRefreshWork.status: In the House - Hearing 3/11 at 1:00 p.m. (Judiciary)

publishedRefreshWork.title: North Carolina S327
publishedRefreshWork.summary: North Carolina Senate bill to establish a Bitcoin reserve, authorize the State Treasurer to allocate public funds into bitcoin, and expressly permit the reserve to back bonds for public projects.
publishedRefreshWork.shortNote: Official reserve bill also contemplates Bitcoin-backed bond use, making it the clearest crossover signal in the expanded batch.
publishedRefreshWork.status: Ref To Com On Rules and Operations of the Senate

publishedRefreshWork.title: Missouri HB1217
publishedRefreshWork.summary: Missouri House bill to create a Bitcoin Strategic Reserve Fund, require a five-year holding period for contributed bitcoin, and broaden the State Treasurer's authority to invest in and hold cryptocurrency.
publishedRefreshWork.shortNote: Bitcoin strategic reserve fund bill pairs direct treasury custody with a five-year holding rule and a completed House public hearing.

publishedRefreshWork.title: South Carolina H4256
publishedRefreshWork.summary: South Carolina House bill to create a Strategic Digital Assets Reserve, authorize capped treasury investment in digital assets including bitcoin, and require custody, reporting, and donation procedures.
publishedRefreshWork.shortNote: Strategic digital assets reserve bill would authorize capped treasury investment, donations, custody controls, and biennial reporting.

publishedRefreshWork.title: New Hampshire BFA Bitcoin-Backed Bond Approval
